name: Composer Trade MCP
what_it_does: Official Composer Trade MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Composer's algorithmic trading platform — creating and managing automated trading strategies, accessing portfolio performance, running backtests, and integrating Composer's no-code trading automation into agent-driven investment workflow management.
use_cases: Creating algorithmic trading strategies from investment planning agents
Running backtests on trading strategies from strategy analysis agents
Managing Composer portfolio allocations from portfolio management agents
Monitoring automated trading performance from tracking agents
Building dynamic trading rules from quantitative analysis agents
Integrating Composer automation into AI-driven investment workflows
not_for: High-frequency trading (Composer focuses on systematic/rules-based trading)
Teams wanting full broker API access (Composer handles execution internally)
best_when: An investor using Composer.trade's algorithmic trading platform needs AI assistance managing and creating automated trading strategies.
avoid_when: You need direct broker API access, high-frequency trading, or don't use Composer.trade.

auth.notes: Composer.trade account and API key required. Account must have API access enabled. Official MCP from Composer.

pricing.notes: Composer.trade is a paid algorithmic trading platform. MCP server is free open source. Account required for API access.

performance.rate_limits: Composer API rate limits apply — check documentation

known_agent_gotchas: Composer.trade account and paid subscription required
Automated trading strategies operate on live accounts — test thoroughly
Backtests are historical — past performance does not guarantee future results
Strategy logic expressed in Composer's DSL — agents must understand the format
Official MCP from Composer but newer integration — API may evolve
Real money at risk with automated strategies — implement risk limits
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Composer API key required — store securely. Official MCP. Live trading account — real money risk. API key has trading authority — protect carefully.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key with trading authority. Official MCP. Real money risk — protect credentials carefully.
